name: UBA : Username to User Accounts, Privileged, Observed
notes: Records Username to "UBA : User Accounts, Privileged, Observed" when a user is observed in privileged activities for the first time.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following UBA : Privileged User, First Time Privilege Use (logic)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Username to User Accounts, Privileged, Observed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following UBA : Privileged User, First Time Privilege Use (logic)
RED_list: Add the "userName" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "UBA : User Accounts, Privileged, Observed"
